description_long: This bird features a slender body with a smooth gradient of color from a warm yellowish-brown head to a muted grayish-brown back and wings. The beak is short, straight, and conical, well-suited for seed eating. Its wings are compact and neatly folded along the sides, displaying subtle feather layering. The tail is straight and moderately long, tapering to a rounded tip. The legs are thin and dark, with visible claws. The plumage is mostly uniform, with gentle transitions between the head, back, and underparts, and no prominent markings or patterns.
description: A slender bird with a yellowish-brown head, grayish-brown wings, and a straight, conical beak. The plumage is smooth and uniform, with a rounded tail and dark legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's full profile, highlighting the gradient from yellowish-brown head to grayish-brown body and the straight, conical beak.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the symmetrical wings folded over the back and the straight, rounded tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the smooth body contour and subtle feather layering.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the conical beak, rounded head, and the transition of color from the head to the back.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with smooth gradient from yellowish-brown head to grayish-brown body and wings
